goal: Build a vision-driven kitting station: 4 cubes (2 red + 2 blue), classified via runtime vision, routed into 4 kit-tray slots — red cubes to top row slots, blue to bottom row. Combines setup_pick_place_with_vision + create_kit_tray.
thoughts:
Six vision-driven kitting specifics for CP-50:
1) Kit tray with 2 ROW segments — top row for red, bottom row for blue. Use 2 separate row trays or single tray with destination_map mapping color → slot.
2) Simplest: 2 separate trays — RedTray (row_2, top) + BlueTray (row_2, bottom). Vision-derived destination_map: red→RedTray, blue→BlueTray.
3) 4 cubes (2 red + 2 blue) distributed on conveyor.
4) setup_pick_place_with_vision classifies all 4 cubes, sets semantic labels, dispatches via color_routing.
5) Red cubes pile in RedTray, blue cubes in BlueTray. Within each tray, cubes settle by physics (no per-slot dispatch).
6) Production version of vision + kitting combined.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red",  shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Blue", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.0, 1.0])

# Cubes — 2 red + 2 blue, alternating positions
color_specs = [
    ("/World/Cube_1", -1.0, "Red"),
    ("/World/Cube_2", -0.7, "Blue"),
    ("/World/Cube_3", -0.4, "Red"),
    ("/World/Cube_4", -0.1, "Blue"),
]
for path, x, mat in color_specs:
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Materials/{mat}")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for c in color_specs:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=c[0], material_name="rubber")

# Two kit trays — top row and bottom row
create_kit_tray(
    tray_path="/World/RedTray",
    position=[-0.3, -0.4, 0.775],
    tray_size=[0.20, 0.10, 0.05],
    slot_layout="row_2",
    slot_size=0.05,
    slot_spacing=0.08,
)
create_kit_tray(
    tray_path="/World/BlueTray",
    position=[ 0.3, -0.4, 0.775],
    tray_size=[0.20, 0.10, 0.05],
    slot_layout="row_2",
    slot_size=0.05,
    slot_spacing=0.08,
)
assign_material(prim_path="/World/RedTray",  material_path="/World/Materials/Red")
assign_material(prim_path="/World/BlueTray", material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")

# Camera + viewport
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cam", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 1.5, 1.5])
set_camera_look_at(camera_path="/World/Cam", target=[0, 0, 0.8])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_with_vision(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    cube_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    class_labels=["red cube", "blue cube"],
    camera_path="/World/Cam",
    destination_map={"red": "/World/RedTray", "blue": "/World/BlueTray"},
    destination_path="/World/RedTray",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/RedTray", "/World/BlueTray"],
)
extension_notes: CP-50 combines runtime vision (CP-47 pattern) with kitting (CP-49 pattern). 2 separate trays — vision dispatches by color. Production-grade vision-driven kitting.
failure_modes: Vision misclassifies — Gemini reliable for distinct red vs blue.
Cubes within each tray not slot-precision-placed (no drop_targets dict). They land in tray but pile up if multiple cubes per tray.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths + xy_tol=0.15 + rest_speed=10 — Cube_4 delivered to RedTray)
